leadText: This article is about the move Gust. For the field move, see Gust (Field Move). Gust (Japanese: かぜおこし Stir Up Wind) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation I. Prior to Generation II, it was a Normal-type move.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I 1.2 Generation II 1.3 Generation III onwards 1.4 Generation VIII 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.5 Generation IX 1.5.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] Gust deals damage and has no secondary effect. It is a Normal-type move in this generation. Generation II [ edit | edit source ] Gust is now a Flying-type move. Gust can hit a Pokémon during the semi-invulnerable turns of Fly and Bounce , and if it does, will deal double the damage . Generation III onwards [ edit | edit source ] Gust is now affected by King's Rock , except in Generation IV. Starting in Generation IV, when used on a Pokémon during the semi-invulnerable turn of Fly or Bounce, the power is now doubled instead of the damage being doubled (resulting in virtually the same effect). Starting in Generation V, this also applies to Sky Drop . Gust can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Gust is a wind move . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Gust's PP was reduced from 35 to 25. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad A Normal -type attack used by bird Pok é mon . A powerful wind is generated by flapping wings. Stad2 A Flying -type attack. The bird Pok é mon flaps its wings to create a powerful wind. G S C Whips up a strong gust of wind. R S E FR LG Strikes the foe with a gust of wind whipped up by wings. Colo XD Hits target with a gust of wind whipped up by wings. D P Pt HG SS PBR A gust of wind is whipped up by wings and launched at the foe to inflict damage. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A gust of wind is whipped up by wings and launched at the target to inflict damage. ZA The user attacks by using its wings to whip up a gust of wind to launch at targets.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target. Doubles damage on a flying or bouncing Pokémon. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. It will inflict double damage on a Flying target or a Bouncing target. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる そらをとぶじょうたいと とびはねじょうたいの ポケモンには ２ばいのダメージをあたえる MD GtI It damages an enemy. It can hit an enemy in the air using Fly and so on. S MD It damages an enemy. It can hit an enemy in the air using Fly and the like. MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It can hit an enemy that's in the air from using Fly and the like.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Gust is the most learned Flying type move through level up. Gust is one of the four moves to have its type changed in Generation II , the others being Karate Chop , Bite , and Sand Attack . They were all Normal-type moves in Generation I . Despite the move's description stating that the wind is whipped up by wings, some wingless Pokémon can learn this move as well. Gust is the only special move with 35 PP, which is the highest of all special moves.
